name: @creatiwity/nuxt-schema
description: Nuxt Schema describe and check API

scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && nuxi dev playground
scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxi prepare playground
scripts.release:patch: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release --patch && npm publish --access=public && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release --minor && npm publish --access=public && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release --major && npm publish --access=public && git push --follow-tags
